Container.Name: M365-Report
Container.Overview: Self-hosted Microsoft 365 Tenant Discovery Report dashboard. Upload Fly Migration Excel reports (.xlsx) to generate interactive dashboards with PDF export. Supports Exchange Online, M365 Groups, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and SharePoint Online.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the M365 Report web interface. Change if 7880 is already in use on your server.

Config.Name: Upload Storage
Config.Description: Where uploaded Excel reports and generated stats JSON files are stored. Survives container updates.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Flask session secret key. Set a long random string to keep sessions secure (e.g. openssl rand -hex 32).
